definitions: The action of a person or animal searching for something by digging or turning over soil or other material.
The action of establishing and developing a firm attachment or connection with something.
The action of cheering or supporting a team or competitor enthusiastically.
The action of a plant developing roots.
The action of a pig or other animal digging with its snout.
examples: The dog was rooting around in the garden.
She's rooting for her favorite team.
The plant is rooting well in the new pot.
He's rooting out the cause of the problem.
The pigs were rooting in the mud.
